creator: ganbold@freebsd.org
text:
Following patches add possibility to list IP addresses from all defined ipfw tables.

For example:

v02# ipfw table all list
---table(1)---
202.179.18.7/32 0
202.179.27.132/32 0
208.48.2.0/24 0
---table(2)---
202.72.244.226/32 0
---table(3)---
61.222.9.212/32 0
74.53.215.0/24 0
75.125.150.0/24 0
75.125.150.18/32 0
75.126.214.0/24 0
121.156.57.4/32 0
163.29.176.20/32 0
212.37.111.0/24 0
---table(4)---
64.202.163.213/32 0
---table(5)---
165.146.30.119/32 0
196.207.13.5/32 0
..

Patches are fully tested on RELENG_7 (FreeBSD 7.1-PRERELEASE #6:
Wed Sep  3 10:02:27 ULAT 2008).

Also these patches successfully applies to CURRENT.
